name: Rich Chocolate Cake or Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt chocolate squares in a double boiler over hot, but not boiling water.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Cream sugar and butter until fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix in vanilla extract.
7. Gradually add dry mixture alternately with milk, mixing well.
8. Fold in chocolate chips.
9. Pour batter into:
- a greased 10 x 15 inch pan for brownies
- a greased 9 x 13 inch pan for cake
10. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes (cake) or 25-30 minutes (brownies).
11. Frost with chocolate glaze when cool.
12. Makes 18 servings.
